crypto_eth15m_midband.note: TIGHTENED from wide May-4 rebalance after backtest of 2832 finalized markets. Only TWO buckets cleared n>=30 + Wilson 95% lo > implied + 3pts: YES 65-70c (n=36, Wilson_lo 71.3%, +3.8 edge) and YES 80-85c (n=49, Wilson_lo 86.3%, +3.8 edge). NO side had no tradeable bucket -> paused. Tonight's biggest loss (YES @67c -$28) was inside the new 65-70c band (sample variance at 71% WR). The other tonight loss (NO @71c -$26) would not fire under new bands.

crypto_eth_hourly_midband.note: Slightly widened NO band lower bound. KXETH calibration showed YES has no edge — keeping NO-only.

crypto_sol15m_midband.note: PAUSED ENTIRELY after backtest of 2831 finalized markets. ZERO buckets across both YES and NO sides cleared n>=30 + Wilson 95% lo > implied + 3pts. Sample sizes are adequate (most buckets n=30-50) so this isn't a sample-size problem; the strategy just doesn't have edge on SOL15M markets in the last 30 days. Tonight's losses (YES @80c -$21, NO @71c -$23) were both in NEAR_FAIR zones. Revisit if regime changes.

crypto_btcd_midband.note: TACTICAL WIDENING from prior [0.70, 0.85, 0.85] to [0.65, 0.88, 0.82] to restore trade volume. After 5/6 audit tightened bands, OmniAlpha went 3 days (5/9-5/11) with zero trades — paper bot generating zero signal teaches nothing. This is the only strategy with demonstrated lifetime YES edge (88% WR, +$61.60). Forecast trimmed from 0.85 to 0.82 (closer to Wilson 95% lower bound) to stay conservative on edge calculation while accepting more variance in entry probability. Other 4 strategies left tight per 5/6 audit. REVIEW 2026-05-17: if fires >=5 trades and PnL > -$30, keep these bands; if <3 trades or loss > $30, revert to [0.70, 0.85, 0.85] and run jbecker recalibration on fresh data.

crypto_btc15m_midband.note: YES 75-80c is the ONLY band with confirmed edge in 2832-market historical backtest: n=34, WR=94.1%, Wilson95 lo=80.9%, implied=77.5%, edge=+3.4%. Forecast trimmed from 0.85 (stale 2-month-old calibration) to 0.81 (Wilson 95% lower bound). YES 80-95c had n=256 across 4 buckets and showed NO edge — kept dropped. NO band 20-30c had n=35-78 across buckets, all NEAR_FAIR — kept as-is from prior live config.
